data.title: Albertsons tries out a new AI assistant for shoppers
data.description: The assistant builds off of earlier AI work that Albertsons rolled out with Google Cloud technology.

data.title: Instacart sees boost as Cyber 5 expectations put pressure on November Ecommerce Stock Index results
data.description: Only one category was up as the overall Ecommerce Stock Index fell going into the holiday season's busiest shopping week.

data.title: Salesforce Q3 results show steady growth as AI adoption accelerates
data.description: Combined annual recurring revenue (ARR) for Agentforce and Data 360 grew 114% year over year to nearly $1.4 billion.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: 5 holiday shopping shifts that mattered during the Cyber 5
data.description: For a new generation of consumers holiday shopping journeys are beginning in new places, with ecommerce recommendations on social media and AI platforms as important as it has ever been.

data.title: Estée Lauder taps Shopify to speed ecommerce transformation
data.description: The company said the partnership — described as a first-of-its-kind for the beauty sector — will build a unified digital commerce foundation spanning direct-to-consumer websites and freestanding stores.
